---
title: "github"
---

```{r knitr_config, include=FALSE}
source("~/github/how2/_knitr_config.R")
```

*********************************************************************

## github flavoured markdown

### badges

```{r, echo=FALSE, results="asis"}
badges = "<!-- badges: start -->

[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/oddments)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=oddments)

[![Travis build status](https://travis-ci.org/dkidney/oddments.svg?branch=master)](https://travis-ci.org/dkidney/oddments)

[![AppVeyor build status](https://ci.appveyor.com/api/projects/status/github/r-lib/NAME?branch=master&svg=true)](https://ci.appveyor.com/project/r-lib/NAME)

[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/oddments/oddments/branch/master/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/oddments/oddments?branch=master)

[![Lifecycle:experimental](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-experimental-orange.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#experimental)  
[![Lifecycle:maturing](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-maturing-blue.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#maturing)  
[![Lifecycle:stable](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-stable-brightgreen.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#stable)  
[![Lifecycle:retired](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-retired-orange.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#retired)  
[![Lifecycle:archived](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-archived-red.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#archived)  
[![Lifecycle:dormant](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-dormant-blue.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#dormant)  
[![Lifecycle:questioning](https://img.shields.io/badge/lifecycle-questioning-blue.svg)](https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/#questioning)  

<!-- badges: end -->
"
cat_text(badges)
cat("\n", badges, "\n", sep = "\n")
```

* https://www.tidyverse.org/lifecycle/  

### emojis

These render from `.md` files within github.

* https://github.com/ikatyang/emoji-cheat-sheet/blob/master/README.md  
* https://gist.github.com/rxaviers/7360908  

```
:monkey:
```

*********************************************************************

## github pages

https://pages.github.com/

* sign in to Github and navigate to your repo  
* go to `Settings`  
* scroll down to the `Github Pages` section  
* under `Source` select `master branch` (or whatever option you prefer)  
* choose a theme if you want one  
* your pages should now be available at http://username.github.io/repository  

*********************************************************************
